name: TC4 Original Parity Repair
fixed: Removed fake scan/research unlock behavior from Goggles of Revealing and restored TC4-style reveal semantics plus 5% vis discount adapter.
Removed fake scan/research unlock behavior from Helmet of Revealing compatibility path.
Replaced fake Research/Warp overlay with reveal-only aura node HUD when looking at an AuraNodeBlockEntity while wearing revealing gear.
Switched AuraNodeRenderer from fake per-type block sprites to original textures/misc/nodes.png 32-frame sprite sheet with TC4 row mapping.
Reworked standalone ResearchTableScreen toward original GuiResearchTable coordinates: guiresearchtable2.png, aspect page, selected slots, combine icon and original page arrow areas.
Changed ResearchNoteScreen hex cells from fake squares to original hex1.png/hex2.png assets while keeping Stage161 grid center adapter.
Patched TC4 Goggles recipe from ConfigRecipes.java line 1393: leather/gold/thaumometer pattern, GOGGLES research, original aspect costs.
Patched TC4 Thaumometer recipe from ConfigRecipes.java line 3476: gold/glass/any primal shard ore-dictionary style.
Patched TC4 Infusion Matrix recipe from ConfigRecipes.java line 997: arcane stone, ender eye, any primal shard, INFUSION research and 40 Ordo.
Disabled wrong vanilla fallback/original_style placeholder recipes through quarantine conditions.
Added Forge shard tags mirroring TC4 any-primal-shard behavior.
Copied original gogglesrevealing.png into the primary goggles_of_revealing texture path.
Moved old fake aura_node_sprite_* textures out of active resources into compatibility_quarantine/stage206_fake_node_sprites/.
Quarantined fake Helmet of Revealing scan/overlay research nodes from ResearchRegistry so passive reveal gear is not exposed as invented progression.
still_not_full_original: Infusion Matrix behavior is only recipe/material/entry corrected here; full multiblock + pedestal ring + instability logic needs Stage207.
Research Table/Note rendering is closer to original but still uses a 1.19.2 adapter for networking/container state.
All ConfigRecipes.java recipes have not yet been fully materialized and audited; Stage207/Stage208 should continue recipe parity.
next_stage: Stage207 Infusion Matrix full parity start
compatibility_quarantine: disabled fallback recipe JSONs with forge:false conditions
